title: Saint Lucia Passport
metaDescription: St. Lucia passport ranks 34th place according to the Guide Passport Ranking Index, It provides visa-free access to 142 countries.

sections.heading: Saint Lucia Passport
paragraphs: To obtain Saint Lucia passport through the citizenship by investment program

sections.heading: Saint Lucia Passport
paragraphs: The Saint Lucia passport is the main travel document available from St. Lucia, a Caribbean island nation. St. Lucia citizens can use their Saint Lucia passport to travel outside of the country and as a form of official documentation (ID) for domestic purposes. The country’s recent transition to a biometric passport reflects its ongoing commitment to development and security. The St. Lucia passport design reflects the country’s heritage; it shows the St. Lucia parrot (the country’s colorful, albeit endangered, national bird), as well as its coat of arms, emblazoned with the national motto: “The Land, the People, The Light.”

sections.heading: Validity of the Saint Lucia Passport
paragraphs: The validity of the Saint Lucia passport is 5 years. Holders of the Saint Lucia passport should typically seek to renew their passport six months before it expires.

sections.heading: Saint Lucia Passport Power
paragraphs: The Saint Lucia passport is ranked 34th among global passports according to the Guide Consultants Passport Ranking Index. The Saint Lucia passport power reflects the number of countries you may use it to travel to—i.e. the 142 Saint Lucia passport visa-free travel countries, which are the number of foreign destinations you can enter with just your passport (i.e. without a visa, or with just a visa on arrival or an electronic travel authorization (eTA)—both of which are easy and quick to acquire).

sections.heading: How to Apply for Saint Lucia Passport
paragraphs: Only citizens of St. Lucia may apply for the Saint Lucia passport. Applicants who became St. Lucian citizens by birth must submit a birth certificate, while those who became citizens through marriage or adoption must submit proof of naturalization. Applicants for the St. Lucia passport who achieved citizenship through the Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment program must include their certificate of citizenship on their passport application form. The following is a list of the requirements and application steps for obtaining a Saint Lucia passport:
list: Fill out a St. Lucia passport application: Access the St. Lucia passport application form and fill out the basic biographical information, such as your full name, date of birth, and current address. This is your main form, which you will submit and send to the St. Lucia passport application unit.

Submit your required documents: • Proof of citizenship (birth certificate, CBI certificate, etc). • For divorced/married/widowed female applicants: proof of married/divorced/widowed status • Police report • Prior passport/passport recovery form • National ID card (if the applicant is 18+) • NIS card (if the applicant is between the ages of 16-17)

Submit your passport photos: • Applicants must submit two passport photos not older than three months (from the date of application) and measuring 2x2 inches. • Photo subject should be facing the camera, with the entirety of his/her face and hair showing (i.e. not covered by glasses, hat, hood, scarf, hat, etc). • Background of photo should be neutral/white/non dark in color. • Photo subject should have mouth closed, eyes open. • Recommender’s signature (if applicable) as well as the name of applicant should be written on the blank side of one of the two photos. • Please note that photos should be professional in nature (i.e. developed professionally, printed on professional/thick photo paper), taken with a proper camera.
Pay your Saint Lucia passport fees

Submit your complete St. Lucia passport application: Most St. Lucia passport applications are received by mail. Applicants seeking to enjoy the benefits of the Saint Lucia passport need to apply for St. Lucia citizenship via the Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment Program through which they can obtain Saint Lucia citizenship and passport.

sections.heading: Saint Lucia Passport Benefits
paragraphs: The numerous Saint Lucia passport benefits include, but are not limited to, the following:
list: Saint Lucia passport power: The St. Lucia passport is ranked 34th in the world; a powerful ranking among global passports. Highlights of the Saint Lucia passport visa-free travel include access to the 27 European Schengen states, as well as to the United Kingdom, Singapore, and South Korea—among many others across Asia, the Middle East, South America, etc.

Profitable Investment: The Saint Lucia passport is a profitable investment that can be obtained through the Saint Lucia citizenship by investment program, thus benefitting its holders with great investment opportunities and tax exemptions.
Dual passport: St. Lucia passport holders may retain their original passport (or acquire a passport from another country) due to the country’s allowance of dual citizenship.
Biometric passport: The Saint Lucia biometric passport is a sophisticated and secure passport that guarantees an advanced level of protection against data theft or impersonation.

sections.heading: Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment and Saint Lucia Passport
paragraphs: The Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment program is the only economic pathway for non-citizens of St. Lucia to receive a Saint Lucia passport. Investors who successfully apply to receive CBI through the Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment program will find it easy to meet the Saint Lucia passport requirements and ultimately receive their travel document. In addition to all the Saint Lucia passport visa-free travel benefits reflected by the Saint Lucia passport power, successful applicants for the Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment program will enjoy numerous advantages to becoming a citizen of St. Lucia. Once you achieve citizenship, you will be able to enjoy numerous financial perks, such as low taxes, investment opportunities on the island (in real estate and other commercial entities). In addition to the economic possibilities inherent to becoming a citizen of St. Lucia, a successful applicant can also enjoy residency on the island , should he or she choose to live there. While the Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment program does not have residency requirements (meaning you don’t have to live there in order to retain your citizenship or Saint Lucia passport) living on the island is advantageous for many reasons: the country is beautiful, safe, and secure, and offers an idyllic tropical paradise for investors and their families. The Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment program offers several investment options for investors seeking St. Lucian citizenship and quick Saint Lucia passport. These are as follows:
list: Donation to the National Economic Fund. Saint Lucia Citizenship by Investment through cash investment to into a national fund devoted to the island’s development
Real estate investment. St Lucia Citizenship by Investment by purchase of pre-approved St. Lucian real estate on the island
Government bonds. St Lucia Citizenship by investment by purchase of government bonds for a pre-set amount

sections.heading: Saint Lucia Visa Free Countries
paragraphs: Over the past number of years, the government of Saint Lucia has been successfully working on expanding its list of Visa-free countries
